senses.definition_en: to share or exchange information, news, or ideas with someone

examples.en: Good managers communicate clearly with their teams.
examples.fa: مدیران خوب به‌روشنی با تیم‌های خود ارتباط برقرار می‌کنند.

senses.definition_en: to have a relationship in which people express their feelings and ideas openly

examples.en: After the argument, they finally started communicating again.
examples.fa: بعد از دعوا، بالاخره دوباره شروع به صحبت با یکدیگر کردند.
